7010335.title: Tkachuk
7010335.extract: Tkachuk, Tkatchuk  (Ukrainian: Ткачук) is a common Ukrainian surname in Ukraine and the Ukrainian diaspora. The name in Ukrainian stands for the name of occupation, weaver. The names that end in -chuk or -czuk are of the western Ukrainian origin. Polish-language variant: Tkaczuk. Notable people with the surname include:

categories.title: Category:Short description is different from Wikidata
